channel.title: GeoPulse. Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefings on geopolitics, edited by Lavkesh Dwivedi.

item.title: Israel and Hezbollah Trade Strikes in Lebanon, as Iran Talks Remain on Hold
item.description: Israel and Hezbollah exchanged strikes in Lebanon as US-Iran talks stalled. Cease-fires in Lebanon and Iran are on shaky ground, with military attacks flaring and direct talks between Washington and Tehran to end their war stalled.

item.title: Milan and Juve offer up another 0-0 draw to consolidate top-four grip
item.description: Milan and Juventus drew 0-0 to maintain their top-four positions. Milan and Juve offer up another 0-0 draw to consolidate top-four grip.

item.title: Iran's foreign minister returns to Pakistan after U.S. envoys' trip canceled
item.description: Iran's foreign minister returned to Pakistan after a US envoy trip was canceled. Live Updates: Iran's foreign minister returns to Pakistan after U. S. envoys' trip canceled CBS News. Iran's foreign minister returns to Pakistan after U. S.

item.title: Iran’s foreign minister leaves Pakistan, heads to Russia for more talks
item.description: Iran's foreign minister Abbas Araghchi travelled to Russia for talks with senior officials. Abbas Araghchi travels to Russia, where he will speak with "senior officials", Iran's foreign ministry says. Iran’s foreign minister leaves Pakistan, heads to Russia for more talks.

item.title: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: 14 killed, 37 injured in Israeli strikes in south
item.description: Israeli strikes in south Lebanon killed 14 people and injured 37 despite a ceasefire. US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: 14 killed, 37 injured in Israeli strikes in south Lebanon despite ceasefire, officials say The Times of India.

item.title: Former Israeli PMs Bennett, Lapid unite to challenge Netanyahu in elections
item.description: Former Israeli PMs Bennett and Lapid formed an alliance to challenge Netanyahu in elections. The two politicians' alliance is aimed at uniting a fragmented opposition against current PM Benjamin Netanyahu.

item.title: Has Iran exposed the limits of what US can achieve by force?
item.description: Vali Nasr says US and Israeli military options have come up short. Political scientist Vali Nasr argues that US and Israeli military options ‘have come up short'. Has Iran exposed the limits of what US can achieve by force?

item.title: Israel issues forced evacuation orders for southern Lebanon in escalation
item.description: Israel issued forced evacuation orders for southern Lebanon amid ceasefire tensions. Hezbollah rejects allegations from Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu that it is undermining the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire. Israel issues forced evacuation orders for southern Lebanon in escalation.

item.title: Trump says Iran can call U.S. if it wants to negotiate
item.description: Trump said Iran can call the US if it wants to negotiate. Iran FM back in Pakistan after Oman visit, says report; Iran's Foreign ​Minister Abbas Araghchi ‌held talks in ​Oman, discussed security ‌in the Strait of Hormuz, ‌broader ⁠Gulf waters, ⁠and diplomatic efforts to end the ​Iran-U. S.

item.title: Trump Event Shooting Highlights: Accused Shooter Likely Targeted Trump And His Top Officials
item.description: Donald Trump was evacuated after gunshots were heard at his event. The accused shooter, identified as Allen from Torrance, California, was taken into custody by police. Trump Event Shooting Highlights: Accused Shooter Likely Targeted Trump And His Top Officials.

item.title: "I Want To Throw Up, Cry": What Trump Event Shooter Wrote In His Manifesto
item.description: Allen, the 31-year-old shooter from Torrance, California, wrote in his manifesto that he wanted to throw up and cry. His manifesto was sent to his family before the shooting. Allen, 31, from Torrance, California, was taken into custody after the shooting.

item.title: 10 Minutes Before Firing At Trump Event, Shooter Sent A Manifesto To Family
item.description: Allen sent his manifesto to his family 10 minutes before firing at the Trump event. His brother raised the alarm after receiving the manifesto. It was Allen's brother who first raised the alarm.

item.title: Trump Event Shooter's Manifesto Spares FBI Chief Kash Patel From Hit List
item.description: The manifesto of Allen, the Trump event shooter, spared FBI Chief Kash Patel from his hit list. Allen was taken into custody after running through a security checkpoint. Allen was taken into custody after police said he ran through a security checkpoint.

item.title: Trump and officials 'likely' targets of press dinner shooting suspect, authorities believe
item.description: Authorities believe the press dinner shooting suspect targeted Trump and officials. The suspect is expected to be charged with assault of a federal officer and using a firearm during a crime of violence, officials have said.

item.title: Trump Event Shooter Mocked Hotel Security In Manifesto, Said 'Won't Use Slugs'
item.description: Trump stated the shooter acted alone as a "lone wolf". The suspect had mocked hotel security in a manifesto. Trump said officials believed he acted alone and was what he called a "lone wolf".

item.title: Xi Jinping’s Four Peace Initiatives after the Iran War
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping proposed four peace initiatives following the Iran war. The details of these initiatives were not specified in the available information. Xi Jinping’s Four Peace Initiatives after the Iran War Modern Diplomacy.

item.title: Israel’s President, Putting Off Decision on Pardon for Netanyahu, Will Push for Plea Deal
item.description: Israel's President Isaac Herzog will not pardon Benjamin Netanyahu. Instead, he will seek a plea deal in Netanyahu's corruption case. President Isaac Herzog of Israel has decided not to issue a pardon to Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu in his corruption case at this time, and instead will seek mediation, officials say.

item.title: Taiwan will not 'bow its head': FM hits out at China during visit to Eswatini
item.description: Taiwan's foreign minister visited Eswatini and criticized China, saying no blockade or pressure can shake Taiwan's resolve to safeguard its dignity and connect with the international community. “No unreasonable blockade or pressure can shake our resolve and will to safeguard our dignity and connect with the international community,” he added.

item.title: First trial of Assad-era Syrian official starts in Damascus
item.description: Syria's first public trial of a former Assad-era official, Atef Najib, has started in Damascus. Syria begun its first public trial of former Assad-era officials, with ex-security chief Atef Najib appearing in court.

item.title: UAE-Iran differences and India’s plans to dilute language on Israel-Palestine derail joint
item.description: India hosted a BRICS deputy foreign ministers' meeting, but a joint statement couldn't be agreed upon due to differences between UAE and Iran, and India on Israel-Palestine language. A 'Chair's Statement' was issued instead.
